positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for olympic_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u9,axiom,
    most_medals(united_states,tokyo)).

cnf(u10,negated_conjecture,
    ~most_medals(united_states,last_summer_olympic_games)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define summer_olympic_games(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define last_summer_olympic_games(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:

for all inputs,
